function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-02T18:21:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - miles@novak.example
subject: "Re: Need linked invoices"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_01_17__eur_000890__inv_0004__northstar_design_partner_sprint.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_12_01__eur_000530__inv_0003__northstar_backfill_gamma.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_11_03__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md
  - 50_finance/invoices/2025_10_06__eur_000610__inv_0001__northstar_backfill_alpha.md
---
Hi Miles,

Attached are the oldest 4 invoices linked to your design partner (Nina Schreiber).

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed; verification checklist passes: attachments are read files and ordered newest-first, recipient matches canonical Miles entity, subject colon is quoted. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Wrote outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Processed oldest inbox item end-to-end: verified sender identity, resolved design partner, selected oldest four linked invoices, drafted reply with correct attachment ordering rule, and deleted inbox item.
next_step.observation: Deleted processed inbox file 00_inbox/000_invoice-bundle-request.md.

function.message: Processed the oldest inbox message by drafting a reply email to Miles with the oldest 4 invoices linked to his design partner (Nina Schreiber), then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed required bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read nested AGENTS in entered folders, used process-next-inbox-item workflow, treated inbox header as canonical email metadata, verified sender against canonical primary_contact_email, used canonical related_entity linkage for finance lookup, created outbound email in outbox with newest-first attachment ordering, and deleted processed inbox item only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Inbox request from miles@novak.example matched canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/miles.md. 'Design partner' resolved to Nina Schreiber via startup_partner relationship in 10_entities/cast/nina.md. Invoice linkage confirmed by `related_entity | Nina Schreiber` in five invoice records; selected the oldest four by issue date (2025-10-06, 2025-11-03, 2025-12-01, 2026-01-17) and attached them in required newest-first outbox order in 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-02T18-21-00Z.md. Processed inbox file was then deleted per workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: search cast for partner and read 10_entities/cast/nina.md
